results.title: Diverse deep-sea anglerfishes reduced luminous symbiont — eLife
results.reason: Source-domain biology only; one content-word match and far below semantic/functional thresholds.

results.title: Smithsonian Anglerfish bacteria
results.reason: Popular-science source-domain piece; no exact 8-word substring matches and well below thresholds.

results.title: Anglerfish bioluminescence science — Biology Insights
results.reason: Biology source domain only; no exact phrase matches and very low semantic/functional similarity.

results.title: SignalLLM (2025/9)
results.reason: External-tool orchestration paradigm, not internal residual gated symbiont module; below all thresholds.

results.title: Towards Signal Processing in LLMs (2024/6)
results.reason: Internal signal-processing primitives, not host-frozen symbiont with attenuation gate.

results.title: SCRAMBLe Synthetic Preference (2025/4)
results.reason: Preference-data generation; orthogonal mechanism to gated-symbiont architecture.

results.title: LLM-Adapters family (2023/4)
results.reason: Co-trained PEFT adapters; lacks externally-acquired symbiont, attenuation gate, and saturating cap; pre-cutoff.

results.title: Conditional Adapter Module Plug (2025/9)
results.reason: External conditional adapter plugged into a frozen host with gated activation captures the HGSSGM externally-acquired-auxiliary + host-gating mechanism, exceeding both semantic and functional thresholds.

fail_reason: Result 8 (arxiv 2509.16861 Conditional Adapter Module Plug) clears both semantic (0.72>=0.7) and functional (0.78>=0.7) thresholds, instantiating frozen-host + externally-acquired auxiliary module with gated activation — functionally equivalent to HGSSGM's core claim.
